query: cloud-based treatment planning system brachytherapy HIPAA security

results.title: Comparing Digital to Conventional Physical Therapy for Chronic Shoulder Pain: Randomized Controlled Trial.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 37490337. 2023/08/18 00:00. BACKGROUND: Chronic shoulder pain (CSP) is a common condition with various 
etiologies, including rotator cuff disorders, adhesive capsulitis, shoulder 
instability, and shoulder arthritis. It is associated with substantial 
disability and psychological distress, resulting in poor productivity and 
quality of life. Physical therapy constitutes the mainstay treatment for CSP, 
but several barriers exist in accessing care. In recent years, 
telerehabilitation
